title: The Humbler - Danny Gatton
overview: Danny was a master of blues, country, rock, bluegrass, and  jazz styles – his ability was so overwhelming to other guitarists that they nicknamed him  “The Humbler”.  Danny Gatton has often been called “The World’s Greatest Unknown Guitarist” because he never got the recognition he deserved in his short life.
